characters.name: Ander Muñoz
characters.description: AnderSeason 8Season 4Season 3Season 2Season 1Biographical InformationAge16 (Season 1)16-17 (Season 2)17 (Season 3) , (Season 4)GenderMaleEye ColorHazelHair ColorBrownHeight1.82 m (6'0")StatusAliveCharacter InformationOccupationStudent (Las Encinas) (formerly)Tennis Player (formerly)EducationLas EncinasResidenceMuñoz House(formerly)NicknameHot Shot (byRebeka)Andres (byOmar)Mr. X (byChristian)Pibón/Hot stuff (byRebeka)[1]Muñoz (byBenjamín)Instagram@siempreizquierdoRelationshipsFamilyAzucena(mother)Antonio(father)FriendsPolo† (best friend; forgiven)Guzmán(best friend)Marina†ChristianSamuel†RebekaNadiaCarlaLuAlexisCayetanaNanoRomance(s)Omar(ex-boyfriend)Polo(hookup)Patrick(ex-lover)EnemiesPablo RuizYusef(formerly)Imán(formerly)Polo† (formerly)MalickBenjamínPortrayalPortrayerArón PiperSeasons1,2,3,4Appears in32 episodesFirst AppearanceLast AppearanceWelcome(1x01)Before I Go (Part II)(4x08) Ander Muñozwas a main character through Seasons 1-4 of the Netflix seriesElite, serving as one of the three tritagonists (alongsideNadiaandOmar) of its first overall story arc and a supporting character of its second overall story arc. He is a student attending the upper class private schoolLas Encinas.But however, unlike his friends, he is not as wealthy, but was accepted to the school as his mother was the principal of the school. He is shy, selfless, and does what he can to protect those he cares about. He is portrayed byArón Piper. Ander had been best friends withGuzmánandPolosince he was a child. The three of them all attended Las Encinas together where they continued to be close.

She is portrayed byCarla Díaz. Ari is the daughter of the new principal inLas Encinas. characters.name: Azucena
characters.description: AzucenaBiographical InformationGenderFemaleStatusAliveCharacter InformationOccupationPrincipal (Las Encinas; formerly)ResidenceMuñoz HouseRelationshipsFamilyAnder(son)Antonio(ex-husband)FriendsOmarGuzmánMarina†Samuel†AndreaBegoñaEnemiesYusefMartínBenjamínPortrayalPortrayerElisabet GelabertSeasons1,2,3,4Appears in25 episodesFirst AppearanceLast AppearanceBienvenidos(1x01)Before I Go (Part II)(4x08) Azucenais a recurring character on thefirst,second,thirdandfourth seasonof theNetflixseriesElite. She isAnder's mother, as well as the former principal ofLas Encinas. She is portrayed byElisabet Gelabert. As principal, Azucena insists thatNadiadoes not wear her hijab at school, otherwise she will have no choice other than to expel her. Eventually, she discovers that her son Ander is gay and in a relationship withOmar. Azucena supports her son, but when Nadia and Omar's fatherYusefpulls Nadia out of the school during exams, Azucena accidentally lets slip that Omar is gay in her frustration. AfterMarina's murder, Azucena is among those who are interrogated.

characters.name: Beatriz Caleruega
characters.description: BeatrizBiographical InformationAge40sGenderFemaleStatusAliveCharacter InformationOccupationOwner ofMarquesado de Caleruega(formerly)ResidenceRosón Caleruega HouseRelationshipsFamilyTeo(husband)Carla(daughter)FriendsLuYerayEnemiesChristianPortrayalPortrayerLola MarceliSeasons1,2,3Appears in15 episodesFirst AppearanceLast AppearanceDeseo(1x02)Rebeka(3x06) Lady Beatriz Caleruegais a recurring character on thefirst,secondandthird seasonof theNetflixseriesElite. She isCarla's mother. She is a very wealthy woman, once her family is from the Spanish nobility, having lands and properties all around the Spain. She is the current head of the family, the noble and old House of Caleruega, being a Grandee of Spain. She is entitled and stylized as Her Excellency, Lady Beatriz de Caleruega, Marchioness of Caleruega (orLa Excelentísima Señora, Doña Beatriz de Caleruega, La Marquesa de Caleruegain Spanish). Even having all her House's wealth, she becoming interested in the art of winemaking, and made her own fortune by creating her own vineyard, calledMarquesado de Caleruega, which quickly became one of the largest and most important in Spain, even internationally recognized. This being, currently, the main source of his family's fortune. The marchioness also has a consort, her husband,Teodoro Rosón, The Marquess of Caleruega. She is portrayed byLola Marceli.

characters.name: Carla Rosón Caleruega
characters.description: CarlaSeason 8Season 3Season 2Season 1Biographical InformationAge16 (Season 1)17 (Season 2) , (season 3)GenderFemaleEye ColorGreen/HazelHair ColorBlondeHeight166 cm (5'5")StatusAliveCharacter InformationOccupationStudent (King's College London)Student (Las Encinas; graduated)CEO ofMarquesado de Caleruega(Family Winery)EducationKing's College London (Presumably graduated)Las Encinas(graduated)ResidenceRosón Caleruega House, Spain (formerly)Carla and Polo's Apartment, Spain (formerly)London, England (current)NicknameMarchioness/La Marquesa/La MarquesitaGuapa/Guapísima/Gorgeous (byChristian)Reina/Babe (byChristian)Blondie/La rubia (byRebeka)[1]Instagram@marquesitaponRelationshipsFamilyBeatriz(mother)Teo(father)Guzmán(godsibling)FriendsLu(best friend)PoloGuzmánAnderNadiaValerioYerayRebekaRomance(s)Polo† (ex-boyfriend)Christian(ex-boyfriend)Samuel† (ex-boyfriend, in love with)Yeray(ex-boyfriend)EnemiesMarina†Samuel† (formerly)NanoRebeka(formerly)Cayetana(formerly)ChristianInspectoraTeoPortrayalPortrayerEster ExpósitoSeasons1,2,3Appears in24 episodesFirst AppearanceLast AppearanceWelcome(1x01)Carla Samuel: Part 3 Carla Rosón Caleruegais a main character through Seasons 1-3 of theNetflixseriesElite, serving as one of the two main antagonists (along withPolo) of the first overall story arc. She attended and graduated fromLas Encinas. She is portrayed byEster Expósito. Carla is among the wealthiest students at Las Encinas due to her father's status as a very successful businessman, but more primarily the wealth of her mother's family, the nobleHouse of Caleruega, of which she is the head. Her mother is a member of the Spanish nobility, a Grand of Spain as the current Marchionesses of theMarquesado de Caleruegaand owns a vineyard with the same name,meaning that Carla is an aristocrat and the heiress of the Marquesado de Caleruega, the future marchioness. She obtained her nicknameLittle Marchioness(orLa Marquesa/La Marquesitain Spanish) due to this. As in the Spanish nobility rules, as daughter of Grands of Spain, she has also a personal Greatness (Grandeza Pessoalin Spanish), which is lower than a true Greatness of Spain, but Carla is still stylized as Lady Carla Caleruega Rosón (orDoña Carla Caleruega Rosónin Spanish). It may be expected that a noble's child, particularly the heir, to have a noble title lower than their parents, but it's unknown if Carla has one (in this case she would be a countess, viscountess or baroness).

characters.name: Christian Varela Expósito
characters.description: ChristianSeason 8Season 2Season 1Biographical InformationAge16 (Season 1)17 (Season 2)GenderMaleEye ColorBrownHair ColorBrownHeight1.70 m (5'7")StatusAliveCharacter InformationOccupationStudentEducationLas Encinas(formerly)San Esteban(formerly)ResidencePrivate hospital in SwitzerlandHouse of Varela ExpósitoNicknameThe Influencer (byGuzmán)[1]Cateto/Bumpkin (byPolo)[2]Troglodita/Caveman (byLu)[3]Narcissus (byPolo)[4]Míster Cavernícola/Neanderthal (byLu)[5]Instagram@pekechristian007RelationshipsFamilyUnnamed motherUnnamed fatherEligenio (cousin)FriendsSamuel† (best friend)NadiaNano(best friend)AnderOmarMarina†Romance(s)Carla(ex-girlfriend)Polo(fling)EnemiesPolo†CarlaLu(formerly)Guzmán(formerly)PortrayalPortrayerMiguel HerránSeasons1,2Appears in9 episodesFirst AppearanceLast AppearanceWelcome(1x01)20 hours missing(2x01) Christian Varela Expósitowas a main character through Seasons 1-2 of theNetflixseriesElite, serving as one of the two overarching protagonists (along withMarina) of its first overall story arc. He attendedLas Encinason a scholarship afterSan Estebancollapsed. He is portrayed byMiguel Herrán. Christian attendedSan Estebansecondary school prior to the building's collapse, which injured Christian. As compensation, he and two other students were given scholarships toLas Encinas, the elite secondary school thirty miles from San Esteban.
